title: School and education
explanation:
School and education

  • people: teacher, student, classmate
  • places: classroom, library, playground
  • things: book, pen, pencil, notebook, desk, board
  • subjects: English, maths, science, history

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The ____ writes on the board. | *teacher | desk | library
I borrow books from the ____. | *library | playground | pen
We sit at a ____ in the classroom. | *desk | subject | student
My favourite ____ is English. | *subject | notebook | board

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Open your ____ on page ten. | book
We have ____ in the lab on Tuesdays. | science
The children play in the ____. | playground
Every ____ needs a pen and paper. | student

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: My ____ sits next to me. | *classmate | library | maths
I write notes in my ____. | *notebook | teacher | playground
We study ____ — numbers and sums. | *maths | desk | pen
The lesson is in the ____. | *classroom | history | pencil
